[1086.150-1198.870] interviewee: I was the only one who decided, no. I'm going back home because I want to see what my family is doing-- my parents, my brother, and my sister. And naturally, I got rid of my uniform, my identifications. I bought this suit. And I started to march westwards back to the Germans. The first five minutes I marched, maybe five, six minutes, is now a German soldier-- in German, what are you doing here? And since I speak
